headline: The Cigna Group Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: The Board of Directors of The Cigna Group (NYSE: CI) today declared a cash dividend of $1.56 per share of its common stock, payable on June 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on June 4, 2026.
